positive: A highly stylized, central composition featuring a bioluminescent celestial fox peering out from behind stylized lunar mountain ranges. The art should utilize clean, bold linework, mimicking a neo-traditional woodcut or stained glass aesthetic. Include detailed floral elements (such as blooming night lilies and ferns) intertwined with constellations and wispy nebulae smoke. The color palette must be restricted to deep indigo, glowing teal, ethereal gold, and matte black, emphasizing strong contrast and glow effects. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed for immediate scalability onto apparel. Crisp lines, high detail, vector quality, perfect silhouette.
negative: blurry, noisy, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, ugly, poorly drawn, distorted, extra limbs, fused fingers, out of frame, bad anatomy, cropped, modern photography, realism
